svg.title: TGA - Governed Agent Runtime Architecture
svg.desc: Execution path, trust boundaries, persistence, and developer observability for TGA-TeamGipsyAgent.
svg.text: EXECUTION PATH, TRUST BOUNDARIES, PERSISTENCE, AND DEVELOPER OBSERVABILITY
Zod validation · React Query · event reducer
input staging · settings · artifact preview · report
Owns lifecycle, governance, execution admission, and terminal state
OBSERVE: context chars · token usage · retrievals
OBSERVE: turns · idle continuation · provider errors
OBSERVE: admission · denial code · latency · retry
Tool result + Artifact reference → next turn
bounded read-only context → validated patch only
Cannot execute tools or complete a task
Governed adjuncts: state ownership remains with Manager

g.text: LOCAL MCP: shared path, least privilege mounts
explicit POST export · GET is pure
policy decision · missing evidence · terminal status

svg.text: Audit transcript is immutable; provider context is bounded.
